name: Daphne
description: Daphne is very quirky, and energetic. She goes long lengths to get her products sold. Daphne often jumps around the room and comes across as highly enthusiastic. Her personality changes when Natsu and Wendy mention dragons,  ~!and Daphne reveals it was a lie. When Gray shows up she speaks to him as if he is her master, and her previous energetic personality suddenly disappears. !~
